description: Agentic commerce for AI agents: multi-network wallet, x402 payments, AgenC hires, 20k+ services
name: io.github.xona-labs/xpay

environmentVariables.description: Wallet profile to load or create (default: active profile, else "default")
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Encrypts the auto-generated wallet at rest; also unlocks an existing encrypted profile
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_PASSPHRASE

environmentVariables.description: Set to error instead of auto-generating a wallet when none is configured
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_NO_AUTO_WALLET

environmentVariables.description: Use an existing Solana secret key (base58) instead of the generated wallet
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_SOLANA_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Use an existing EVM private key instead of the generated wallet
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_EVM_KEY

environmentVariables.description: EVM network for XPAY_EVM_KEY (e.g. base, base-sepolia)
environmentVariables.name: XPAY_EVM_NETWORK

packageArguments.description: Start the MCP server on stdio
